vaultHealth.title: Vault Health
vaultHealth.subtitle: A quick snapshot of your vault before you dive in.

hero.title: Your vault is indexed. Pick one useful next step.
hero.body: Nexusky keeps the files local, then uses the index to explain what is worth asking, repairing, or mapping next.

scanning.title: Building a local snapshot
scanning.desc: Reading files, links, tasks, and memory signals without changing your notes.

error.title: Vault health is unavailable
error.desc: You can still open the vault and keep working. Details:

askAi.title: Ask AI about your vault
askAi.desc: Start a vault-wide question and cite the notes used.
askAi.prompt: Give me a sourced tour of this vault. Use the local search/tools, cite the notes you use, and say clearly if no relevant notes are found. Current health: {{notes}} notes, {{links}} links, {{unresolved}} unresolved links, {{orphans}} isolated notes, {{tasks}} open tasks, {{missingMemory}} notes without Memory Ledger.

fixLinks.title: Resolve {{count}} unresolved links
fixLinks.desc: Open the maintenance queue and clean up broken wikilinks.

browseGraph.title: Browse the knowledge graph
browseGraph.desc: See clusters, bridges, and isolated notes at a glance.

welcome.subtitle: Local Markdown stays in your folder. Nexusky builds memory, search, and reviewable AI actions around it.

graph.title: Graph
graph.emptyHint: Use [[links]] in your notes to build connections

aiWorkspace.noProviderToast: Configure an AI provider to use chat, edit, or agent actions. Files, Search, Graph, Vault Health, and Maintenance still work without AI.

aiProviderErrors.empty: AI request failed. Try again or check provider settings.
aiProviderErrors.localArchitecture: The app architecture does not match this machine. Install the build for your processor.

kinds.api_key: API key or permission problem. Check the key, account access, and billing status.
kinds.model: Model name problem. Choose a model supported by this provider.
kinds.network: Network or Base URL problem. Check the endpoint, proxy, DNS, and local service status.
kinds.rate_limit: Rate limit or quota problem. Wait, reduce request volume, or check quota and billing.
kinds.context: Context is too long for the selected model. Use a larger-context model or send less context.
kinds.timeout: Provider request timed out. Retry or switch to a faster endpoint.
kinds.unknown: AI request failed. Check provider settings and try again.

chatMessages.emptyHint: You can also type a question, or use @ to cite notes.

citedVaultQuestion.title: Ask with sources
citedVaultQuestion.detail: Search the vault and cite matching notes
citedVaultQuestion.prompt: What are the main themes in this vault? Cite the notes you used, and say clearly if no relevant notes are found.

editCurrent.title: Improve current note
editCurrent.detail: Prepare a reviewable structure and wording edit
editCurrent.prompt: Improve the current note structure, heading hierarchy, and clarity while preserving the original facts.

rewriteSelection.title: Rewrite selection
rewriteSelection.detail: Select text in the editor, then refine it
rewriteSelection.prompt: Rewrite the selected text so it is clearer and better suited for long-term knowledge base storage.

batchNotes.title: Generate linked notes
batchNotes.detail: Build a small linked knowledge base around a topic
batchNotes.prompt: Generate 5 interlinked Markdown notes around a topic. Each note should have a clear title, summary, key points, and [[bidirectional links]]. Topic:

generateGraph.title: Generate graph
generateGraph.detail: Analyze the current note and generate relations

mentionNote.title: @ cite a note
mentionNote.detail: Use a specific note as context for this turn

maintenance.title: Knowledge Maintenance
maintenance.contextEmpty: Open a note to view related context.

agentBatch.title: Send the top maintenance items to Agent for a reviewable plan
agentBatch.empty: No maintenance items to hand off.

weeklyReview.title: Weekly cognitive review
weeklyReview.desc: Generate an evidence-backed review from relations, themes, repeated questions, blockers, and resurfaced context.

today.title: Start with these
today.desc: The queue is sorted by impact. Handle a few small items, then continue when the vault feels lighter.

pending.label: Scanning
pending.detail: Checking maintenance signals for this view.

jumps.focusInBasesTitle: Open the properties view focused on this note so you can edit properties, then come back to refresh.

confirm.markDoneMessage: {{count}} task(s) will be marked as done.

idle.hint: Describe a goal. The AI plans multi-step actions, you preview, then execute.

fields.goalPlaceholder: e.g. Bulk-generate memories for notes missing one
fields.dryRun: Dry run (preview only, do not write)

plan.title: Plan ({{count}} steps)
plan.empty: AI could not produce a plan. Refine the goal and try again.

tools.list_notes_by_memory_term: Find notes by Memory Ledger concept

longContextDebug.saveOk: Saved. Will apply on next chat.

editor.openRelatedContext: Open related context for the current note

propertiesPanel.empty: Open a note to edit its properties.
propertiesPanel.title: Title
propertiesPanel.titleHint: Overrides the first H1 in the file as the display title
propertiesPanel.aliasesHint: One alias per line, supports [[alias]] resolution
propertiesPanel.tagsHint: One tag per line, # is optional

copyWikilink.label: Copy current note wikilink
copyWikilink.description: Copy as [[note title]] for pasting into another note

templateMarketplacePack.label: Install featured template pack
templateMarketplacePack.description: Install Zettelkasten, literature, ADR, weekly review, and course templates from the built-in marketplace

importObsidian.label: Import Obsidian Vault
importObsidian.description: Import Markdown, attachments, and internal link structure

importReadwise.label: Import Readwise highlights
importReadwise.description: Choose a Readwise CSV export and generate source-linked notes grouped by article

importPocket.label: Import Pocket read-later
importPocket.description: Choose a Pocket HTML export and generate note-ready reading entries

importNotion.label: Import Notion export
importNotion.description: Choose a Notion Markdown, CSV, or HTML export folder and convert page links and database tables

chat.label: Open AI workspace
chat.description: Chat, cited answers, editing, and batch generation entry point

aiRag.label: Ask from knowledge base
aiRag.description: Search the vault and cite notes automatically

aiEditCurrent.label: AI edit current note
aiEditCurrent.description: Generate an edit plan and write only after confirmation

aiRewriteSelection.label: AI rewrite selection
aiRewriteSelection.description: Use the current selection as editing context

aiNewNote.label: AI generate new note
aiNewNote.description: Create a new Markdown note without binding to the current file

aiBatchNotes.label: AI batch generate linked notes
aiBatchNotes.description: Build a topic knowledge base skeleton

summarize.label: AI summary into current note
summarize.description: Insert a summary at the beginning of the current note

pluginMarketplacePack.label: Install featured plugin pack
pluginMarketplacePack.description: Install research, meeting, and evergreen-note workflow plugins

bases.label: Open properties view
bases.description: Browse, filter, and organize notes by frontmatter, tags, aliases, and status

timeline.label: Open timeline
timeline.description: Review note activity by creation or update time

graphCurrent.label: Generate AI graph for current note
graphCurrent.description: Infer concept relationships from the current note

inferLinks.label: Infer vault-wide semantic links
inferLinks.description: Fill implicit relationships and refresh the knowledge graph

memoryIndex.label: Build Memory Ledger
memoryIndex.description: Create note-level memories for long-term knowledge linking

publishVault.label: Publish vault static site
publishVault.description: Export the whole vault as deployable HTML

properties.label: Open note properties
properties.description: Edit title, aliases, tags, and cssclasses

viewContextPack.label: View Context Pack
viewContextPack.description: Inspect Active / Nearby / Archive Memory Ledger tiers, token usage, and tuning

openAgent.label: Review execution history
openAgent.description: Advanced: inspect saved plans, steps, reflections, and rollback records

openMaintenance.label: Open maintenance queue
openMaintenance.description: Browse unresolved links, orphan notes, open tasks and one-click fixes

newWindow.label: Open new window
newWindow.description: Create an independent Nexusky window for viewing different areas in parallel

resetWorkspace.label: Reset workspace layout
resetWorkspace.description: Restore the editor, sidebar, and right panel default layout

search_notes.label: Search notes
search_notes.description: Run local relevance search across the vault

find_similar_notes.label: Find similar notes
find_similar_notes.description: Find notes lexically similar to the current one

find_memory_related_notes.label: Find Memory Ledger relations
find_memory_related_notes.description: Find notes that share Memory Ledger terms with the current one

find_connection_opportunities.label: Find connection opportunities
find_connection_opportunities.description: Suggest potential links for the current note

read_current_note.label: Read current note
read_current_note.description: Output the current note content to the result panel

find_text_in_current_note.label: Find text in current note
find_text_in_current_note.description: Locate matches inside the current note

list_note_links.label: List links of a note
list_note_links.description: Inspect outgoing and incoming links of a specific note

list_current_note_links.label: List current note links
list_current_note_links.description: Inspect outgoing and incoming links of the current note

summarize_current_note_links.label: Summarize current note links
summarize_current_note_links.description: Have AI summarize the connection structure

list_current_note_unlinked_references.label: Unlinked references in current note
list_current_note_unlinked_references.description: Find references that aren't yet wikilinks

list_unresolved_links.label: List unresolved links
list_unresolved_links.description: Find links pointing to missing notes

list_orphan_notes.label: List orphan notes
list_orphan_notes.description: Notes with no inbound or outbound links

list_unreferenced_notes.label: List unreferenced notes
list_unreferenced_notes.description: Notes that no one links to

list_memory_folders.label: List Memory Ledger folders
list_memory_folders.description: Browse Memory Ledger coverage by folder

list_notes_missing_memory.label: List notes missing Memory Ledger
list_notes_missing_memory.description: Notes that do not have Memory Ledger entries yet

read_current_note_memory.label: Read current note Memory Ledger
read_current_note_memory.description: Show Memory Ledger entries for the current note

prompts.rag: Answer based on the current knowledge base:
prompts.editCurrent: Improve the current note structure, heading hierarchy, and clarity while preserving the original facts.
prompts.rewriteSelection: Rewrite the selected text so it is clearer and better suited for long-term knowledge base storage.
prompts.newNote: Create a complete structured note about:
prompts.batchNotes: Generate 5 interlinked Markdown notes around a topic. Each note should have a clear title, summary, key points, and [[bidirectional links]]. Topic:

toasts.memoriesDone: Memory Ledger complete: {{generated}} added, {{skipped}} skipped, {{failed}} failed

bases.title: Properties View
bases.searchPlaceholder: Search titles, paths, tags, aliases, or any property...
bases.emptyHint: Add frontmatter at the top of a note, or use the right properties panel to fill title, tags, aliases, and other fields.
bases.guideTitle: How to use the properties view
bases.guideFrontmatter: 1. Add frontmatter to notes, or maintain title, aliases, tags, and cssclasses in the right properties panel.
bases.guideSearch: 2. Use search, tag filtering, and sorting to manage projects, tasks, courses, or article status.
bases.guideEdit: 3. Double-click a cell to edit a property; saving writes back to the original Markdown file.
bases.columnsHint: Choose which custom frontmatter fields are shown. Core columns are always visible.
bases.noCustomColumns: This vault has no extra custom property columns yet.

canvas.title: Properties and Timeline
canvas.associationAlreadyLinked: This link already exists in the note

associationReason.tag: These cards share tags, so the relationship is strong enough to capture as a topic link.
associationReason.source: These cards came from the same source and may belong to the same reading or import context.
associationReason.title: Their titles share terms, which may point to the same concept or question.

canvas.guideDrag: 1. Drag cards to arrange them; layout is saved per vault.
canvas.guideOpen: 2. Double-click a card to open its Markdown note.
canvas.guideLinks: 3. Solid arrows come from [[wikilink]] relations in notes.
canvas.guideSuggestions: 4. Faint dashed lines are automatic association hints from shared tags, sources, or title terms.
canvas.guideZoom: 5. Ctrl/Cmd + mouse wheel or trackpad pinch zooms around the pointer.
canvas.guidePan: 6. Drag an empty canvas area to pan the view.
canvas.guideCreate: 7. New nodes appear near the current view center and avoid existing nodes.
canvas.focusMenu: Focus this card and its links
canvas.guideFocus: 8. Right-click a card to show only it and its direct links; press Esc or the top button to exit focus.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.summary: {{count}} notes, {{today}} updated today, {{week}} updated in the last 7 days
timeline.searchPlaceholder: Search titles, paths, tags, or aliases...

reader.title: Reader Inbox
reader.searchPlaceholder: Search titles, authors, sources, tags, or status...

triageReason.unread: This item has not been processed yet, so it belongs at the front of the reading flow.
triageReason.read: This item has already been read. The next useful step is connecting it to a project, topic, or durable note.
triageReason.tagged: Existing tags point to a topic, so it is ready to be placed into the knowledge space.
triageReason.source: A source URL is available, making this a good item to reopen later for verification or capture.
triageReason.later: No clear status is present yet, so it is parked without interrupting the current reading flow.
triageReason.archived: This item is archived and stays out of the default processing queue.

reader.notePlaceholder: Capture what this changes, connects to, or needs next...
reader.aiDigestFailed: Failed to prepare AI digestion prompt
reader.emptyImports: No imported Notion, Readwise, or Pocket content yet

common.semanticFailed: AI semantic analysis failed, showing existing relations only
common.pluginPanelNoContent: This plugin panel has no content to display.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Themes apply across the sidebar, editor, dialogs, and AI panels.

accent.title: Accent color
accent.description: Overrides links, buttons, selection states, and focus color in the current theme.

themePackages.title: Theme packages
themePackages.description: Loads .nexusky/themes/*.json from the current vault and applies global color variables.
themePackages.builtinHint: Only apply the selected theme and accent color above.
themePackages.noVault: Open a vault to use theme packages.
themePackages.empty: No theme packages yet. Add .json files to .nexusky/themes, then refresh.

snippets.title: CSS snippets
snippets.description: Loads .nexusky/snippets/*.css from the current vault and lets each snippet be toggled independently.
snippets.noVault: Open a vault to use CSS snippets.
snippets.empty: No CSS snippets yet. Add .css files to .nexusky/snippets, then refresh.

noAiMode.title: No AI provider configured
noAiMode.description: You can keep using the local vault. Add a provider only when you want AI chat, editing, or agent actions.

cloudSync.title: Sync health
cloudSync.description: Check the latest sync, failure reason, and queued transfers for the active cloud backend.
cloudSync.recoveryHint: Sync overwrites save the previous Markdown version to History. Files removed by sync are moved to Trash before deletion.
cloudSync.boundaryHint: Local vaults and bring-your-own sync stay free. Official managed sync / backup remains a future paid add-on.
cloudSync.syncConflict: Sync finished with ↑{{pushed}} ↓{{pulled}} and {{count}} conflicts to resolve.

conflicts.title: Conflict recovery
conflicts.description: Both copies changed in the merge window. Review the timestamps and hashes, then keep the version you want.
conflicts.explanation: Keep local pushes the current vault copy back to the backend. Pull remote replaces the local file with the remote copy.
conflicts.keepLocalHint: Writes the vault copy back to the backend.
conflicts.pullRemoteHint: Overwrites the local file with the remote version.

configIssues.name: Add a provider name.
configIssues.api_key: Add an API key or keep a saved key.

errorKinds.api_key: Check the API key and account permissions.
errorKinds.model: Check the model name and provider type.
errorKinds.network: Check the Base URL and network connection.
errorKinds.rate_limit: Check quota, billing, or rate limits.
errorKinds.context: Use a model with a larger context window.
errorKinds.timeout: The request timed out. Try again or use a faster endpoint.
errorKinds.unknown: Check provider settings and try the test again.

proactive.title: Proactive suggestions
proactive.description: Surface noteworthy hints while the app analyzes relations, long-term themes, and tasks in the background.
